resources.string: Sadie is not a therapist, not a diagnosis tool, and not a substitute for professional mental health care. If you\'re in crisis, please reach out to a professional.
Message cleared. You held off — that takes strength. 💜
HoldOff intercepts messages before you send them in messaging apps and gives you a moment to pause, reflect, and decide if now is the right time. No messages are stored — only analyzed in the moment.
